raw_sql:
SELECT 
  department,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) AS avg_pct_complete,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN percent_complete END), 1) AS avg_pct_complete_when_done
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY completion_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  department,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS completed,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), ?n) AS avg_pct_complete,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN percent_complete END), ?n) AS avg_pct_complete_when_done
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY completion_rate_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  department,
  category,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY department, completion_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  department,
  category,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS completed,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY department, completion_rate_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  department,
  category,
  ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) AS avg_target_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) AS avg_actual_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete - target_percentage), 1) AS avg_overachievement,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN target_percentage END), 1) AS avg_target_when_completed,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY department, avg_overachievement DESC;
template:
SELECT 
  department,
  category,
  ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), ?n) AS avg_target_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), ?n) AS avg_actual_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete - target_percentage), ?n) AS avg_overachievement,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN target_percentage END), ?n) AS avg_target_when_completed,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY department, avg_overachievement DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
  department,
  priority,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) AS avg_actual_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) AS avg_target_pct
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, priority
ORDER BY department, priority;
template:
SELECT 
  department,
  priority,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS completed,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), ?n) AS avg_actual_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), ?n) AS avg_target_pct
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, priority
ORDER BY department, priority;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  department,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_critical,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS overall_completion_rate,
  -- Simulate IT priority mix applied to other depts
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') AND state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) AS completion_rate_high_crit,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Low','Medium') AND state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Low','Medium') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) AS completion_rate_low_med
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY pct_high_critical DESC;
template:
SELECT
  department,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_high_critical,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS overall_completion_rate,
  -- Simulate IT priority mix applied to other depts
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) AND state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END), ?n), ?n) AS completion_rate_high_crit,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) AND state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END), ?n), ?n) AS completion_rate_low_med
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY pct_high_critical DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  department,
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date) AS year,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_critical,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)
ORDER BY department, year;
template:
SELECT
  department,
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date) AS year,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_high_critical,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)
ORDER BY department, year;

raw_sql:
WITH dept_priority_rates AS (
  SELECT
    department,
    priority,
    COUNT(*) AS goals,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate
  FROM flag_28
  GROUP BY department, priority
),
it_priority_mix AS (
  SELECT
    priority,
    COUNT(*) AS it_goals,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) AS it_pct
  FROM flag_28
  WHERE department = 'IT'
  GROUP BY priority
)
SELECT
  d.department,
  ROUND(SUM(d.completion_rate * i.it_pct / 100.0), 1) AS predicted_rate_with_IT_mix,
  MAX(CASE WHEN d.department = 'IT' THEN 
    (SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state='Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) FROM flag_28 WHERE department='IT')
  END) AS it_actual_rate
FROM dept_priority_rates d
JOIN it_priority_mix i ON d.priority = i.priority
GROUP BY d.department
ORDER BY predicted_rate_with_IT_mix DESC;
template:
WITH dept_priority_rates AS (
  SELECT
    department,
    priority,
    COUNT(*) AS goals,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate
  FROM flag_28
  GROUP BY department, priority
),
it_priority_mix AS (
  SELECT
    priority,
    COUNT(*) AS it_goals,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), ?n) AS it_pct
  FROM flag_28
  WHERE department = ?s
  GROUP BY priority
)
SELECT
  d.department,
  ROUND(SUM(d.completion_rate * i.it_pct / ?n), ?n) AS predicted_rate_with_IT_mix,
  MAX(CASE WHEN d.department = ?s THEN 
    (SELECT ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state=?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END)/COUNT(*),?n) FROM flag_28 WHERE department=?s)
  END) AS it_actual_rate
FROM dept_priority_rates d
JOIN it_priority_mix i ON d.priority = i.priority
GROUP BY d.department
ORDER BY predicted_rate_with_IT_mix DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  department,
  metric,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_critical
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, metric
ORDER BY department, completion_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT
  department,
  metric,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_high_critical
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, metric
ORDER BY department, completion_rate_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  department,
  CASE 
    WHEN (end_date - start_date) < 90 THEN 'Short (<90d)'
    WHEN (end_date - start_date) < 180 THEN 'Medium (90-179d)'
    ELSE 'Long (>=180d)'
  END AS duration_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_critical
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, duration_bucket
ORDER BY department, duration_bucket;
template:
SELECT
  department,
  CASE 
    WHEN (end_date - start_date) < ?n THEN ?s
    WHEN (end_date - start_date) < ?n THEN ?s
    ELSE ?s
  END AS duration_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_high_critical
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, duration_bucket
ORDER BY department, duration_bucket;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN ((end_date - start_date) < 90) THEN 'Short (<90d)'::text WHEN ((end_date - start_date) < 180) THEN 'Medium (90-179d)'::text ELSE 'Long (>=180d)'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT
  g.department,
  ROUND(AVG(u.tenure_years), 2) AS avg_tenure_years,
  ROUND(AVG(u.decline_rate), 4) AS avg_decline_rate,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.owner) AS distinct_owners,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN g.state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_28 g
LEFT JOIN flag_28_sysuser u ON u.department = g.department
GROUP BY g.department
ORDER BY completion_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT
  g.department,
  ROUND(AVG(u.tenure_years), ?n) AS avg_tenure_years,
  ROUND(AVG(u.decline_rate), ?n) AS avg_decline_rate,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.owner) AS distinct_owners,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN g.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_28 g
LEFT JOIN flag_28_sysuser u ON u.department = g.department
GROUP BY g.department
ORDER BY completion_rate_pct DESC;

GROUP BY g.department

raw_sql:
SELECT
  u.department,
  COUNT(*) AS user_count,
  ROUND(AVG(u.tenure_years)::numeric, 2) AS avg_tenure_years,
  ROUND(AVG(u.decline_rate)::numeric, 4) AS avg_decline_rate,
  ROUND(MIN(u.decline_rate)::numeric, 4) AS min_decline_rate,
  ROUND(MAX(u.decline_rate)::numeric, 4) AS max_decline_rate
FROM flag_28_sysuser u
WHERE u.department IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY u.department
ORDER BY avg_decline_rate;
template:
SELECT
  u.department,
  COUNT(*) AS user_count,
  ROUND(AVG(u.tenure_years)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_tenure_years,
  ROUND(AVG(u.decline_rate)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_decline_rate,
  ROUND(MIN(u.decline_rate)::numeric, ?n) AS min_decline_rate,
  ROUND(MAX(u.decline_rate)::numeric, ?n) AS max_decline_rate
FROM flag_28_sysuser u
WHERE u.department IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY u.department
ORDER BY avg_decline_rate;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  department,
  owner,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_crit_goals,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_crit,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_28
WHERE department = 'IT'
GROUP BY department, owner
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY pct_high_crit DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT
  department,
  owner,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS high_crit_goals,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_high_crit,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_28
WHERE department = ?s
GROUP BY department, owner
HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
ORDER BY pct_high_crit DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  owner,
  COUNT(DISTINCT department) AS dept_count,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT department, ', ' ORDER BY department) AS departments,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_crit_overall,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') AND department = 'IT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN department = 'IT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) AS pct_high_crit_in_IT,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') AND department != 'IT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN department != 'IT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) AS pct_high_crit_outside_IT
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY owner
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT department) > 1
ORDER BY dept_count DESC, total_goals DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT
  owner,
  COUNT(DISTINCT department) AS dept_count,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT department, ?s ORDER BY department) AS departments,
  COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_high_crit_overall,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) AND department = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN department = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END), ?n), ?n) AS pct_high_crit_in_IT,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) AND department != ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN department != ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END), ?n), ?n) AS pct_high_crit_outside_IT
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY owner
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT department) > ?n
ORDER BY dept_count DESC, total_goals DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  department,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY department), 1) AS pct_of_dept,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete)::numeric, 1) AS avg_pct_complete,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('Critical','High') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_high_crit
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, state
ORDER BY department, total DESC;
template:
SELECT
  department,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY department), ?n) AS pct_of_dept,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_pct_complete,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_high_crit
FROM flag_28
GROUP BY department, state
ORDER BY department, total DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  department,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN percent_complete >= target_percentage THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS met_target,
  SUM(CASE WHEN percent_complete < target_percentage THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missed_target,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN percent_complete >= target_percentage THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_met_target,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete - target_percentage)::numeric, 1) AS avg_gap
FROM flag_28
WHERE state = 'Completed'
GROUP BY department, state
ORDER BY department;
template:
SELECT
  department,
  state,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN percent_complete >= target_percentage THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS met_target,
  SUM(CASE WHEN percent_complete < target_percentage THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS missed_target,
  ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN percent_complete >= target_percentage THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_met_target,
  ROUND(AVG(percent_complete - target_percentage)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_gap
FROM flag_28
WHERE state = ?s
GROUP BY department, state
ORDER BY department;
